outcome_record.event_name: FIFA World Cup 2026 Qualifier — Brazil vs Argentina (CONMEBOL)

prediction.pre_match_note: Brazil vs Argentina — World Cup qualifier. SUPERCLÁSICO modifier × 1.85 signal weight. Derby form compression 50%. SMS 65 = low confidence (derby + World Cup qualifier context). Draw premium applied based on derby intelligence.

calibration_flags.notes: Superclásico draw premium validated — correctly predicted draw. Derby 50% form compression means the result becomes extremely unpredictable; draw is a structurally rational outcome. Third wrong-direction would have been if we'd picked a winner. SMS 65 correctly reflected uncertainty.
